subcodes.first_line: O God, my Hope and ultimate Desire! A verdant leaf, fresh and vibrant, moistened by the dewdrops from the clouds of Thy mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا رجائی و غایه منائی ان ورقه خضله نضره ریانه من رشحات سحاب رحمتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death, @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for forgiveness
